Part.Source:
&HojeData= serverdate() loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan &FilLog = 'END: ' + trim(FilLog) + ', ' + trim(FilNro) + ' - ' + trim(FilBai) &FilCidNom = 'CIDADE: ' + trim(FilCidNom) + ' - ' + trim(FilCidUfeCod) + ' CEP: ' + trim(FilCep) If not FilCpj.IsEmpty() &FilCon = 'CNPJ: '+ trim(FilCpj) EndIF If not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &FilCon += ' FONE: ' + trim(FilFonNum) EndiF
if FilImg_LogRel.IsEmpty() &FilImg350_120.FromImage(FilialSemImagem) Else &FilImg350_120 = FilImg_LogRel EndIF Exit EndFor
For each Order EmpCod,CtlCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtlCod = &CtlCod &CtlNom = CtlNom.Trim() &CtlNom = &CtlNom.ToUpper() &TabCod = TabCod &CtlTabPrmCod = CtlTabPrmCod &CtlDtaLan = CtlDtaLan &CtlCol1 = CtlCol1 &CtlCol2 = CtlCol2 &CtlCol3 = CtlCol3 &CtlCol4 = CtlCol4 &CtlCol5 = CtlCol5 &CtlMar = CtlMar &CtlTabAnt = CtlTabAnt exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header Print Cabecalho print ProdutosMenu End
For each Order EmpCod, CtlCod, GrupNomCmp, ProNom when &OrdemImpressao = 'G' Order EmpCod, CtlCod, ProNom when &OrdemImpressao = 'N'
Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CtlCod = &CtlCod Where ProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO
&ProCod = ProCod &MarNom = PadR(SubStr(MarNom,1,10), 10, ' ') &auxProNom = GxGetMLi(ProNom, 1, 45) &aux2ProNom = GxGetMLi(ProNom, 2, 45) &NcmCod = NcmCod &ProQtdEmb = ProQtdEmb &MarNom = MarNom &ProPesLiq = ProPesLiq Do 'CodigoReferencia'
Do 'DadosImposto' Do 'Promocao'
if &IsAchou = false // SE não achou promoção Do 'PrecoTabela' EndiF
If &OldGrupHie <> GrupHie and &OrdemImpressao = 'G' &OldGrupHie = GrupHie &GrupNom = 'GRUPO: '+GrupNom.Trim().ToUpper() print Grupo EndIf
Print Produtos If not &aux2ProNom.Trim().IsEmpty() Print ProdutosCpl EndIf Noskip Print Linha
Do 'Zerar' EndFor
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'CodigoReferencia' &ProBarRef = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarOrd, ProBarRef Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = 1 Where ProBarTip = 'A' oR ProBarTip = 'O' //AVULSOS ou original &ProBarRef = trim(ProBarRef) exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'DadosImposto'
For each order EmpCod, FilCod //Filial where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod &FilBasImp = FilBasImp exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,LctCod //Tipo Lancamento where EmpCod = &EmpCod where LctCod = &LctCod &LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,ProCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = &ProCod &ProCatCod = ProCatCod exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Promocao' &IsAchou = false For each Order EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,TabAltCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &CtlTabPrmCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where TabAltCod = TabUltAlt
If &CtlCol5 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc5,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc5+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc5 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc5 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol4 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc4,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc4+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc4 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc4 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol3 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc3,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc3+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc3 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc3 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol2 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc2,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc2+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc2 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc2 EndIf EndIf
If &CtlCol1 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc1,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc1+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc1 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc1 EndIf EndIf
EndFor EndSub
Sub 'PrecoTabela' &ComparativoTabelaMoeda = 0 &ComparativoTabColCod = 0 For each Order EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,TabAltCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &TabCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where TabAltCod = TabUltAlt
&IsValor = true
If &CtlCol5 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc5,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc5+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc5 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc5 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol4 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc4,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc4+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc4 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc4 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol3 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc3,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc3+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc3 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc3 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol2 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc2,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc2+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc2 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc2 EndIf EndIf If &CtlCol1 = true If &IsDestacaImposto = Status_SimNao.Sim RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&UfeCod,&GruImpCod,&ProCatCod,TabPrc1,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ImpValor = TabPrc1+&Moeda &Valor = TabPrc1 Else &ImpValor = 0 &Valor = TabPrc1 EndIf EndIf
EndFor EndSub
Sub 'Zerar' &Valor = 0 &ImpValor = 0 EndSub
